name: Magic Portal
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — a shimmering gate between two points of power. Reskin of the Teleporter.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): place your Unit in contact with any other Magic Portal in play. This immediately ends your Move. A Fireball die or Boulder touching a Portal may be sent through just before it lands.

effects.text: Relocate to any other Magic Portal in play; ends the Move.
